response.first_impression: As a operations manager, I can see the promise if this reduces follow-up friction without adding another messy layer to my week.
response.pain_relevance: The pain feels strong because too many tools already shows up in my routine.
response.solution_attractiveness: The workflow sounds useful but still needs proof.
response.trust_concern: I would need clearer proof on privacy and data boundaries.
response.pricing_reaction: I would resist a subscription unless the value becomes obvious in the first week.
response.what_would_make_them_try: a privacy-light workflow with minimal sensitive data
response.sensitive_concern_if_any: The positioning could create trust issues if it sounds too intrusive or too eager to profile people.

themes.top_trigger: a privacy-light workflow with minimal sensitive data
